title: Hide Bulk Refresh Button Until Multiple Objects Selected
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the bulk refresh button to only appear when I've selected multiple objects, so that the interface stays clean when I'm not performing bulk operations.
description: Hide the Bulk Refresh button by default and only show it when a user has highlighted/selected more than one object. This cleans up the UX by removing controls that aren't relevant for single-object workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Bulk Refresh button is hidden by default
Bulk Refresh button appears when 2+ objects are selected
Button hides again when selection is cleared to 0 or 1
ux_changes: Conditional visibility for Bulk Refresh button based on object selection count.
implementation_notes: Simple conditional display toggle based on selection count.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented and deployed to dev for review.
